resources.string: Language switch key also covers other input methods
Automatically capitalize the 1st char of a sentence
Automatically input a space after selecting a candidate
Enable fullscreen mode on landscape screen
Set keyboard type for each orientation and input mode
Set keyboard type for all input modes
Set keyboard type for each input mode
On toggle input, automatically move the cursor to the right %.1f seconds after a character was entered
On toggle input, do not move the cursor automatically

This function allows you to perform Japanese conversion using external conversion engine such as a Web dictionary server on the Internet. When you tap the button \"Extra Conv\" in the prediction/conversion candidate area, inputting characters for conversion, including personal data like passwords and credit card numbers, might be sent to the external conversion engine through the Internet. Use this function?
Display predicted words for correcting typing error
Word prediction with specified reading string length
Word prediction with specified string length
長い文を一度に入力した場合に、文節の候補も表示する

This function allows you to input text by using the Input Extension plug-in installed separately, such as Mushroom app.\nInput extension plug-ins transfer input character strings and selection character strings for conversion. As such, this may include personal information such as passwords and credit card numbers.
There are no available download dictionaries.
Delete all words in User Dictionary?
Length of the string exceeds the limit.
Display left/right key on QWERTY keyboard
Connection timeout. Only received candidates are displayed.
No usable plug-in could be found.
This function uses \"Google voice typing\". Target languages also follow the settings of \"Google voice typing\".
To turn off voice input, go to \"iWnn IME settings\".
To use voice input, tap on the [Microphone] Key.
Do you want to change the Japanese input mode to \"Kana letter\"?
Do you want to change the Japanese input mode to \"Roman letter\"?
Input half-width space in full-width character input mode
Set number of lines and a display option of candidate area
Show the candidate area even if there are no candidates to be displayed
Enable the japanese keyboard for inputting half-width alphabetic characters
Move cursor within parentheses when entering supported parentheses (「」,【】)
Display number key on QWERTY keyboard
おお文字、こ文字、濁点、半濁点
ピリオド、アットマーク、1
記号種別、%s、カテゴリ、%sに切り替えました
パスワードのキーが音声出力されるのでヘッドセットを接続してください。
候補ビューを縮小しました
候補ビューを拡大しました
This keyboard does not work on your device.\nこの端末ではご利用になれません
